accumulated_insight: T1: Student says 'Can you explain a little more about our experience in dreams and the bardo state'—unknown via seeking conceptual clarification. Teacher responds '' using ontological shift to answers question, provides context, questions premise. Opening UNMAKING move addresses unknown. Predicting request clarification because ontological shift interventions typically produce this response.
visible_response:
In the bardo state, you believe you have eyes that see.
However, everything is merely experience, whether it is the bardo or the hell realms or any other place.
It is all your personal experience.

When you dream at night you see all sorts of different things.
Are those things seen with the eyes?

You believe you have eyes in the dream, don't you?

You walk around and look all over, yet in reality your eyes are closed and you're in bed.

Please understand that all your experience is your personal experience rather than somebody else's.
